CREATE TABLE test_hash (id UInt32, value String, numbers Array(UInt32));
SELECT gccMurmurHash(id, value) AS hash1 FROM test_hash;
SELECT gccMurmurHash(('nested', [1, 2, 3], value)) AS hash2 FROM test_hash WHERE id = 2;
SELECT gccMurmurHash(number) AS hash3 FROM (SELECT arrayJoin(numbers) AS number FROM test_hash WHERE id = 1);
SELECT gccMurmurHash(value, (id, numbers)) AS hash4 FROM test_hash;
SELECT gccMurmurHash(1, 2, 3, (4, [5, 6], 'test')) AS complex_hash FROM test_hash WHERE id < 3;
WITH (SELECT arrayAgg(value) FROM test_hash WHERE id > 1) AS agg_values SELECT gccMurmurHash(agg_values) AS agg_hash;
SELECT gccMurmurHash(SELECT value FROM test_hash WHERE id = 3) AS subquery_hash;
CREATE TABLE join_test (user_id UInt32, detail String);
SELECT gccMurmurHash(t1.value, t2.detail) AS combined_hash FROM test_hash AS t1 JOIN join_test AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.user_id;
